# המצבה — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A professional monument restoration and cleaning service operating in Jerusalem and the central region of Israel. The business focuses on preserving and renewing gravestones, offering families a respectful and meaningful way to maintain their loved ones' memorials. The service carries a tone of dignity, care, and tradition, catering to families seeking quality memorial upkeep.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About המצבה
A professional monument restoration and cleaning service operating in Jerusalem and the central region of Israel. The business focuses on preserving and renewing gravestones, offering families a respectful and meaningful way to maintain their loved ones' memorials. The service carries a tone of dignity, care, and tradition, catering to families seeking quality memorial upkeep.

## Target Audience
- משפחות המעוניינות בטיפול ושיקום מצבות באזור ירושלים והמרכז
- משפחות בירושלים והמרכז
- ארגוני תחזוקת מצבות
- ילדים של קשישים

## Industry
Cemetery & Memorial Services

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
